title.en: Synthetic Hallucinations, Real Gains: Hard Negatives from Frontier Models for FIM Hallucination Mitigation
title.zh: 合成幻觉，真实收益：来自前沿模型的硬负样本用于FIM幻觉缓解

abstract: Small open-source code models that power IDE autocomplete still emit hallucinated Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) completions: syntactically natural calls to methods, parameters, variables, and imports that do not exist in the surrounding project. Existing mitigations either require per-language execution sandboxes that do not apply at mid-keystroke or preference-optimisation pipelines that need large human-labelled corpora. We propose an execution-free alternative: use frontier code models to synthesise plausible-but-wrong completions as hard negatives, then leverage the contrast between these synthetic hallucinations and the ground-truth developer edit as a supervised fine-tuning signal. Our pipeline scrapes multilingual FIM contexts from public GitHub across eight languages and asks a panel of three frontier generators to produce one hard negative per context for each of four hallucination types drawn from the Delulu taxonomy, a Docker-verified multilingual FIM hallucination benchmark, yielding a paired chosen/rejected dataset. Fine-tuning Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct on a 100K-row curated subset lifts Delulu exact match by +18.8 points and edit similarity by +0.22 on every language and every type, while also improving every HumanEval-Infilling split and every SAFIM subset. The same recipe at 3B lifts Delulu by +12.8 EM with a small, characterised general-FIM trade-off. Five-axis ablations (size, type mix, language coverage, base-model family, and a difficulty-aware fool rate) plus a head-to-head SFT vs. DPO/ORPO comparison map which design choices drive the gain. We release the full pipeline source code -- generation, fool-rate LLM judging, curation, and the FIM fine-tuning recipe -- so that the experiments in this paper can be reproduced end-to end on any permissively licensed corpus.

relevance.en: This paper confirms that SFT with synthetic hard negatives from frontier models can reduce FIM hallucinations, extending your interest in post-training for code generation—though it is tangential to execution feedback and human-in-the-loop, and shows SFT outperforming DPO/ORPO on this specific task. The Delulu taxonomy provides a new evaluation dimension relevant to realistic repo-level completion beyond pass@k.
relevance.zh: 本文证实了使用来自前沿模型的合成硬负样本进行SFT可以减少FIM幻觉，扩展了您对代码生成后训练的兴趣——尽管它与执行反馈和人机交互关系不大，并且在该特定任务上显示SFT优于DPO/ORPO。Delulu分类法提供了一个新的评估维度，与超越pass@k的现实仓库级补全相关。

figures.label: Figure 1

caption.en:
A representative FIM hallucination from Delulu. Given the same prefix and suffix (top), a React
useUniqueId hook whose docstring promises that the first call returns 1 and whose body pre-increments the
counter before returning it. The base 7B Code-LLM (bottom left) fills the hole with useRef<number>(1),
so the first call returns 2 and silently violates the documented contract. Our SFT-tuned model (bottom
right) emits useRef(0), matching the developer’s actual edit and the docstring. The failure is local and
plausible: the surrounding lines type-check and run, the hallucinated initialiser looks deliberate, and a unit
test asserting only that IDs are increasing would not catch the off-by-one.
caption.zh: 来自Delulu的代表性FIM幻觉。给定相同的前缀和后缀（顶部），一个React useUniqueId钩子，其文档字符串承诺第一次调用返回1，且其主体在返回前对计数器进行预递增。基础7B Code-LLM（左下）用useRef<number>(1)填充空洞，因此第一次调用返回2并静默违反文档化契约。我们经过SFT调优的模型（右下）发出useRef(0)，匹配开发者的实际编辑和文档字符串。失败是局部且看似合理的：周围行通过类型检查并运行，幻觉的初始化器看起来是故意的，仅断言ID在增加的单元测试不会捕获这个差一错误。

figures.reference_text: The persistent failure mode of such small FIM models is code hallucination: a completion that is syntactically natural and locally plausible, but that violates the project’s true state: calling a method that does not exist, invoking an identifier that was never imported, fabricating a positional argument the API does not accept, or supplying an argument value that contradicts the documented behaviour of the surrounding code (Figure 1).

figures.label: Figure 2

caption.en:
End-to-end pipeline. (1) A multilingual source-code corpus spanning eight languages feeds (2) Fill-
in-the-Middle sampling, which extracts ∼400K real (prefix, golden, suffix) contexts. (3) A panel of three
strong code generators (GPT-5.2-Codex, GPT-5.4, GPT-5.5) emits one hallucinated completion per context
for each of the four taxonomy types, producing a pool of ∼2.5M (prefix, golden, hallucinated) triples. (4) An
optional panel of blind LLM judges scores each row with a fool rate ∈[0, 1] (§3.2); the main proof of concept
does not use this signal. (5) Curation enforces per-language and per-repository quotas and emits a balanced
∼100K-row training set with both the golden completion (chosen) and the hallucinated one (rejected).
(6) Full-parameter SFT of Qwen2.5-Coder-{3B,7B} on the chosen side yields the fine-tuned models we
evaluate. Engineering details are in Appendix B.
caption.zh: 端到端流程。（1）一个跨八种语言的多语言源代码语料库输入（2）填充中间采样，提取约40万个真实（前缀、黄金、后缀）上下文。（3）由三个强代码生成器（GPT-5.2-Codex、GPT-5.4、GPT-5.5）组成的专家组为每个上下文针对四种分类法类型各生成一个幻觉补全，产生约250万个（前缀、黄金、幻觉）三元组池。（4）一个可选的盲LLM评判者组用愚弄率∈[0,1]（§3.2）对每行评分；主要概念验证不使用此信号。（5）策划强制执行每种语言和每个仓库的配额，并产生一个平衡的约10万行训练集，同时包含黄金补全（选定）和幻觉补全（拒绝）。（6）在选定侧对Qwen2.5-Coder-{3B,7B}进行全参数SFT，产生我们评估的微调模型。工程细节见附录B。

figures.reference_text: Our pipeline (Figure 2) turns a multilingual code corpus into a paired chosen/rejected SFT dataset without ever executing the candidate code. The four hallucination types we target are listed in Table 1; they are inherited from the Delulu benchmark (Erfanian et al., 2026) so that gains on Delulu are interpretable as targeted-error reductions, not distribution-shift artifacts.

figure.label: Figure 2

caption.en:
End-to-end pipeline. (1) A multilingual source-code corpus spanning eight languages feeds (2) Fill-
in-the-Middle sampling, which extracts ∼400K real (prefix, golden, suffix) contexts. (3) A panel of three
strong code generators (GPT-5.2-Codex, GPT-5.4, GPT-5.5) emits one hallucinated completion per context
for each of the four taxonomy types, producing a pool of ∼2.5M (prefix, golden, hallucinated) triples. (4) An
optional panel of blind LLM judges scores each row with a fool rate ∈[0, 1] (§3.2); the main proof of concept
does not use this signal. (5) Curation enforces per-language and per-repository quotas and emits a balanced
∼100K-row training set with both the golden completion (chosen) and the hallucinated one (rejected).
(6) Full-parameter SFT of Qwen2.5-Coder-{3B,7B} on the chosen side yields the fine-tuned models we
evaluate. Engineering details are in Appendix B.
caption.zh: 端到端流程。（1）一个跨八种语言的多语言源代码语料库输入（2）填充中间采样，提取约40万个真实（前缀、黄金、后缀）上下文。（3）由三个强代码生成器（GPT-5.2-Codex、GPT-5.4、GPT-5.5）组成的专家组为每个上下文针对四种分类法类型各生成一个幻觉补全，产生约250万个（前缀、黄金、幻觉）三元组池。（4）一个可选的盲LLM评判者组用愚弄率∈[0,1]（§3.2）对每行评分；主要概念验证不使用此信号。（5）策划强制执行每种语言和每个仓库的配额，并产生一个平衡的约10万行训练集，同时包含黄金补全（选定）和幻觉补全（拒绝）。（6）在选定侧对Qwen2.5-Coder-{3B,7B}进行全参数SFT，产生我们评估的微调模型。工程细节见附录B。

figure.reference_text: Our pipeline (Figure 2) turns a multilingual code corpus into a paired chosen/rejected SFT dataset without ever executing the candidate code. The four hallucination types we target are listed in Table 1; they are inherited from the Delulu benchmark (Erfanian et al., 2026) so that gains on Delulu are interpretable as targeted-error reductions, not distribution-shift artifacts.

brief_summary.en:
Small open-source code models that power IDE autocomplete frequently generate "fill-in-the-middle" (FIM) completions that look plausible but invoke nonexistent methods, parameters, or imports—a costly hallucination pattern. Existing fixes either require runtime sandboxes (impossible mid-keystroke) or expensive human-labeled preference data, leaving a scalability gap. The paper proposes an execution-free alternative: use large frontier models to deliberately synthesize plausible-but-wrong completions as hard negatives, then fine-tune a smaller model with supervised learning on the contrast between these synthetic hallucinations and the real developer edits.

The pipeline scrapes multilingual FIM contexts from GitHub across eight languages and asks a panel of three frontier generators to produce one hallucinated completion per context for each of four predefined hallucination types. A curated 100K-row dataset of paired correct/wrong completions is used to fine-tune Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct. This yields an 18.8-point exact-match gain on the Delulu hallucination benchmark across every language and type, plus improvements on HumanEval-Infilling and SAFIM. A head-to-head comparison shows supervised fine-tuning outperforms preference optimization (DPO/ORPO), and multilingual training proves essential—single-language fine-tuning with limited data actually degrades performance. The method is scalable and execution-free, though it cannot catch runtime errors and improvements are bounded by the hallucination types defined in the taxonomy.
brief_summary.zh:
为IDE自动补全提供动力的小型开源代码模型经常生成看似合理但调用不存在的方法、参数或导入的“填充中间”（FIM）补全——这是一种代价高昂的幻觉模式。现有的修复方法要么需要运行时沙箱（在击键中途不可能实现），要么需要昂贵的人工标注偏好数据，留下了可扩展性缺口。本文提出了一种无需执行的替代方案：使用大型前沿模型有意合成看似合理但错误的补全作为硬负样本，然后通过监督学习在这些合成幻觉与真实开发者编辑之间的对比上微调较小的模型。

该流程从GitHub上跨八种语言抓取多语言FIM上下文，并让三个前沿生成器组成的专家组为每个上下文针对四种预定义幻觉类型各生成一个幻觉补全。一个精心策划的10万行配对正确/错误补全数据集用于微调Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct。这在Delulu幻觉基准测试上跨每种语言和类型实现了18.8个点的精确匹配提升，同时在HumanEval-Infilling和SAFIM上也有改进。头对头比较显示监督微调优于偏好优化（DPO/ORPO），并且多语言训练至关重要——单语言微调数据有限实际上会降低性能。该方法可扩展且无需执行，尽管无法捕获运行时错误，且改进受限于分类法中定义的幻觉类型。

problem.en: Small open-source code models used for IDE Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) autocomplete frequently produce hallucinated completions—syntactically natural but semantically invalid calls to methods, parameters, variables, or imports that do not actually exist in the surrounding project. This is a practically significant failure mode because the hallucinated code appears locally plausible (it type-checks and runs superficially) and can silently violate documented contracts or project invariants, yet existing mitigation strategies fall short. Execution-based approaches (e.g., sandboxing a code snippet to catch runtime errors) cannot run at mid-keystroke when the completion is incomplete. Preference-optimisation pipelines (e.g., DPO/ORPO) require large human-labelled corpora of chosen/rejected completions, which are expensive to collect and language-specific. The gap is therefore a scalable, execution-free method to generate high-quality hard negative examples that expose the specific hallucination patterns small models make, and a training signal that teaches the model to avoid those patterns without relying on human annotation or runtime checks.
problem.zh: 用于IDE填充中间（FIM）自动补全的小型开源代码模型经常产生幻觉补全——语法自然但语义无效的调用，涉及周围项目中实际不存在的方法、参数、变量或导入。这是一个实际意义重大的失败模式，因为幻觉代码在局部看似合理（它通过类型检查并表面运行），可能静默违反文档化契约或项目不变量，而现有缓解策略存在不足。基于执行的方法（例如，沙箱化代码片段以捕获运行时错误）在击键中途补全不完整时无法运行。偏好优化流程（例如DPO/ORPO）需要大型人工标注的选定/拒绝补全语料库，这些语料库收集成本高昂且特定于语言。因此，差距在于一种可扩展、无需执行的方法，用于生成高质量硬负样本，暴露小型模型做出的特定幻觉模式，以及一种训练信号，教导模型避免这些模式，而无需依赖人工标注或运行时检查。

solution.en: The paper proposes an execution-free alternative that uses frontier (large, capable) code models to synthesise plausible-but-wrong completions as hard negatives, then leverages the contrast between these synthetic hallucinations and the ground-truth developer edit as a supervised fine-tuning (SFT) signal. The key insight is that frontier models can be prompted to generate completions that are intentionally incorrect in specific, taxonomy-defined ways (e.g., wrong method name, fabricated import), producing high-quality hard negatives that target the exact failure modes of small FIM models. This contrasts with prior work that either requires execution, human labels, or relies on weaker synthetic negatives that are too easy to discriminate. By pairing each real developer completion (chosen) with a frontier-generated hallucination (rejected) and fine-tuning on the chosen side via SFT, the model learns to assign higher probability to correct completions and lower probability to plausible-but-wrong ones, directly reducing hallucination rates without execution or human data.
solution.zh: 论文提出了一种无需执行的替代方案，使用前沿（大型、能力强）代码模型合成看似合理但错误的补全作为硬负样本，然后利用这些合成幻觉与真实开发者编辑之间的对比作为监督微调（SFT）信号。关键见解是，前沿模型可以被提示生成在特定分类法定义的方式上故意不正确的补全（例如，错误的方法名、虚构的导入），从而产生针对小型FIM模型确切失败模式的高质量硬负样本。这与先前需要执行、人工标签或依赖太容易区分的较弱合成负样本的工作形成对比。通过将每个真实开发者补全（选定）与前沿生成的幻觉（拒绝）配对，并通过SFT在选定侧进行微调，模型学会为正确补全分配更高概率，为看似合理但错误的补全分配更低概率，从而直接降低幻觉率，无需执行或人工数据。

methodology.en: The pipeline consists of six stages. (1) Corpus collection: Multilingual FIM contexts are scraped from public GitHub across eight languages (Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C#, Go, Rust, C++). (2) FIM sampling: From the corpus, ~400K real (prefix, golden=developer's actual edit, suffix) triples are extracted using the standard FIM format. (3) Hard-negative generation: A panel of three frontier code generators (GPT-5.2-Codex, GPT-5.4, GPT-5.5) is used; for each context and for each of four hallucination types drawn from the Delulu taxonomy (wrong method name, wrong parameter, wrong variable name, fabricated import), the model is prompted to produce a single plausible-but-wrong completion. This yields a pool of ~2.5M (prefix, golden, hallucinated) triples. (4) Optional judging: A panel of blind LLM judges scores each row with a 'fool rate' in [0,1] indicating how plausible the hallucination is; the main proof-of-concept uses no filtering by this signal, but ablations explore its effect. (5) Curation: Per-language and per-repository quotas are enforced to balance the dataset, yielding a ~100K-row training set where each row has both the golden (chosen) and the hallucinated (rejected) completion. The curation ensures near-uniform coverage across the four hallucination types within each language. (6) Fine-tuning: The base models—Qwen2.5-Coder-{3B,7B}—are full-parameter SFT on the chosen completions (i.e., standard next-token prediction on the golden completion given the prefix and suffix), without using the rejected completions in the loss; the contrast comes implicitly through the model learning to assign higher probability to the chosen side after exposure to many examples. The fine-tuning recipe uses a curated 100K-row subset. The authors release the full pipeline code including generation, fool-rate judging, curation, and the FIM fine-tuning recipe.
methodology.zh: 该流程由六个阶段组成。（1）语料收集：从公共GitHub跨八种语言（Python、JavaScript、TypeScript、Java、C#、Go、Rust、C++）抓取多语言FIM上下文。（2）FIM采样：从语料中，使用标准FIM格式提取约40万个真实（前缀、黄金=开发者实际编辑、后缀）三元组。（3）硬负样本生成：使用三个前沿代码生成器（GPT-5.2-Codex、GPT-5.4、GPT-5.5）组成的专家组；对于每个上下文和从Delulu分类法中提取的四种幻觉类型（错误方法名、错误参数、错误变量名、虚构导入）中的每一种，提示模型生成一个看似合理但错误的补全。这产生了约250万个（前缀、黄金、幻觉）三元组池。（4）可选评判：一组盲LLM评判者用[0,1]范围内的“愚弄率”对每行评分，指示幻觉的合理程度；主要概念验证不使用此信号进行过滤，但消融实验探索了其效果。（5）策划：强制执行每种语言和每个仓库的配额以平衡数据集，产生约10万行的训练集，其中每行同时包含黄金（选定）和幻觉（拒绝）补全。策划确保每种语言内四种幻觉类型之间的覆盖接近均匀。（6）微调：基础模型——Qwen2.5-Coder-{3B,7B}——在选定补全上进行全参数SFT（即，给定前缀和后缀，对黄金补全进行标准下一个词预测），而不在损失中使用拒绝补全；对比通过模型在接触许多示例后学会为选定侧分配更高概率而隐含地出现。微调方案使用策划的10万行子集。作者发布了完整流程代码，包括生成、愚弄率评判、策划和FIM微调方案。

experiments.en: The models are evaluated primarily on the Delulu benchmark, a Docker-verified multilingual FIM hallucination benchmark, and secondarily on HumanEval-Infilling (all splits) and SAFIM (all subsets). The base models are Qwen2.5-Coder-3B and Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct, fine-tuned on the 100K-row curated subset (approximately 12.5K per language × 8 languages, balanced across the four hallucination types). No further tuning is performed for evaluation. On Delulu, the 7B SFT model achieves an exact match (EM) gain of +18.8 points over the base 7B model, and edit similarity (ES) gain of +0.22; these gains hold on every language and every hallucination type. The 3B SFT model gains +12.8 EM on Delulu, with a small characterised general-FIM trade-off (a slight regression on non-hallucination FIM benchmarks). On HumanEval-Infilling, the 7B model improves on every split. On SAFIM, the 7B model improves on every subset. Five-axis ablations are performed: (1) model size (3B vs 7B), (2) hallucination type mix (uniform vs. skewed), (3) language coverage (Python-only vs. multilingual), (4) base-model family (Qwen vs. CodeGemma vs. DeepSeek-Coder), and (5) a difficulty-aware fool rate filtering (removing too-easy or too-hard negatives). A head-to-head comparison of SFT vs. DPO/ORPO on the same paired dataset shows that SFT outperforms DPO and ORPO, which the authors attribute to the paired nature of the data being more naturally suited to the contrast implicit in SFT than to explicit preference optimisation. In the language ablation (Figure 5), at a fixed 16K-row budget, Python-only training yields only 1.9 Delulu EM on Python itself; adding five non-Python languages (with zero Python rows) quadruples multilingual Delulu EM (7.8 → 32.0) and raises Python EM to 20.6, demonstrating cross-lingual transfer from the hard-negative generation.
experiments.zh: 模型主要在Delulu基准测试上进行评估，这是一个Docker验证的多语言FIM幻觉基准测试，其次在HumanEval-Infilling（所有分割）和SAFIM（所有子集）上评估。基础模型是Qwen2.5-Coder-3B和Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct，在策划的10万行子集上微调（大约每种语言12.5K行×8种语言，在四种幻觉类型之间平衡）。评估时未进行进一步调优。在Delulu上，7B SFT模型相对于基础7B模型实现了精确匹配（EM）提升+18.8个点，编辑相似度（ES）提升+0.22；这些提升在每种语言和每种幻觉类型上均成立。3B SFT模型在Delulu上获得了+12.8 EM，带有小的特征化通用FIM权衡（在非幻觉FIM基准测试上略有回归）。在HumanEval-Infilling上，7B模型在每个分割上都有改进。在SAFIM上，7B模型在每个子集上都有改进。进行了五轴消融：（1）模型大小（3B vs 7B），（2）幻觉类型混合（均匀 vs 偏斜），（3）语言覆盖（仅Python vs 多语言），（4）基础模型家族（Qwen vs CodeGemma vs DeepSeek-Coder），以及（5）难度感知的愚弄率过滤（移除太容易或太难的负样本）。在相同配对数据集上SFT与DPO/ORPO的头对头比较显示，SFT优于DPO和ORPO，作者将其归因于数据的配对性质更适合SFT中隐含的对比，而非显式偏好优化。在语言消融（图5）中，在固定的1.6万行预算下，仅Python训练在Python本身上仅产生1.9 Delulu EM；添加五种非Python语言（零Python行）使多语言Delulu EM翻了两番（7.8 → 32.0），并将Python EM提升至20.6，展示了来自硬负样本生成的跨语言迁移。

conclusion.en: The study demonstrates that supervised fine-tuning on synthetic hard negatives generated by frontier code models significantly reduces FIM hallucination rates in smaller open-source models, achieving an 18.8-point exact match gain on the Delulu benchmark across eight languages and four hallucination types. This execution-free, scalable approach outperforms preference optimization methods like DPO and ORPO without sacrificing performance on general FIM tasks. Crucially, multilingual training coverage is essential for robust gains, while single-language fine-tuning with limited data may degrade performance. The method cannot detect runtime errors that require execution, and improvements are confined to the hallucination types defined by the Delulu taxonomy. For practitioners, this offers a low-cost, effective recipe for hallucination mitigation, but they should complement it with execution-based validation for real-world reliability and be mindful of the trade-offs at smaller model scales.
conclusion.zh: 该研究表明，在由前沿代码模型生成的合成硬负样本上进行监督微调显著降低了较小开源模型中的FIM幻觉率，在Delulu基准测试上跨八种语言和四种幻觉类型实现了18.8个点的精确匹配提升。这种无需执行、可扩展的方法优于DPO和ORPO等偏好优化方法，且不牺牲通用FIM任务的性能。至关重要的是，多语言训练覆盖对于稳健收益至关重要，而单语言微调数据有限可能会降低性能。该方法无法检测需要执行的运行时错误，且改进限于Delulu分类法定义的幻觉类型。对于从业者来说，这提供了一种低成本、有效的幻觉缓解方案，但他们应辅以基于执行的验证以实现现实可靠性，并注意较小模型规模下的权衡。

question.en: How does the proposed SFT approach with synthetic hard negatives compare to preference optimization methods like DPO or ORPO, and what does the head-to-head comparison in the paper reveal about the trade-offs between these post-training techniques for hallucination mitigation?
question.zh: 所提出的带有合成硬负样本的SFT方法与DPO或ORPO等偏好优化方法相比如何？论文中的头对头比较揭示了这些后训练技术在幻觉缓解方面的权衡是什么？

reason.en: Directly addresses the user's interest in post-training techniques (SFT vs. preference learning) and asks for a nuanced comparison based on the paper's experiments.
reason.zh: 直接回应用户对后训练技术（SFT与偏好学习）的兴趣，并要求基于论文实验进行细致比较。

reason.en: Probes a key design choice in the post-training pipeline, relating to data quality and model improvement, which aligns with the user's interest in post-training techniques.
reason.zh: 探究后训练流程中的一个关键设计选择，涉及数据质量和模型改进，与用户对后训练技术的兴趣一致。

question.en: How does the proposed SFT approach with synthetic hard negatives compare to preference optimization methods like DPO or ORPO, and what does the head-to-head comparison in the paper reveal about the trade-offs between these post-training techniques for hallucination mitigation?
question.zh: 所提出的带有合成硬负样本的SFT方法与DPO或ORPO等偏好优化方法相比如何？论文中的头对头比较揭示了这些后训练技术在幻觉缓解方面的权衡是什么？

reason.en: Directly addresses the user's interest in post-training techniques (SFT vs. preference learning) and asks for a nuanced comparison based on the paper's experiments.
reason.zh: 直接回应用户对后训练技术（SFT与偏好学习）的兴趣，并要求基于论文实验进行细致比较。

answer.en: The paper’s head-to-head comparison reveals that the proposed supervised fine-tuning (SFT) approach with synthetic hard negatives outperforms both DPO and ORPO preference optimization methods for hallucination mitigation, with no significant trade-off on general FIM benchmarks. The abstract explicitly states that the ablations include “a head-to-head SFT vs. DPO/ORPO comparison” that “map which design choices drive the gain,” and the results show that SFT yields a “+18.8 points” Delulu exact match increase and “+0.22” edit similarity improvement “while also improving every HumanEval-Infilling split and every SAFIM subset.” In contrast, the paper notes that preference-optimization pipelines typically “need large human-labelled corpora,” implying an additional data-cost trade-off for DPO/ORPO. The SFT recipe thus provides stronger gains and avoids the reliance on expensive human annotations, while the preference methods underperform in this controlled comparison.
answer.zh: 论文的头对头比较显示，所提出的带有合成硬负样本的监督微调（SFT）方法在幻觉缓解方面优于DPO和ORPO偏好优化方法，在通用FIM基准测试上没有显著权衡。摘要明确指出消融实验包括“SFT与DPO/ORPO的头对头比较”，这些比较“映射了哪些设计选择驱动了收益”，结果显示SFT在Delulu精确匹配上提高了“+18.8个点”，编辑相似度提高了“+0.22”，“同时改进了每个HumanEval-Infilling分割和每个SAFIM子集”。相比之下，论文指出偏好优化流程通常“需要大型人工标注语料库”，暗示DPO/ORPO存在额外的数据成本权衡。因此，SFT方案提供了更强的收益，并避免了对昂贵人工标注的依赖，而偏好方法在这种受控比较中表现不佳。

question.en: Given that the method is execution-free, what limitations might it have in detecting hallucinations that require execution awareness (e.g., runtime errors), and how could the pipeline be extended to incorporate execution feedback to better align with real-world software engineering tasks?
question.zh: 鉴于该方法无需执行，它在检测需要执行感知的幻觉（例如运行时错误）方面可能存在哪些局限性？如何扩展该流程以纳入执行反馈，从而更好地与真实软件工程任务对齐？

reason.en: Targets the user's focus on execution feedback and RL with execution, probing the paper's core limitation and potential future direction.
reason.zh: 针对用户对执行反馈和带执行RL的关注，探究论文的核心局限性和潜在未来方向。

answer.en: The paper's execution-free method cannot detect hallucinations that require runtime execution, such as NameError or ImportError at runtime, because it never runs code. It relies solely on static plausibility from frontier models, as stated: "We propose an execution-free alternative: use frontier code models to synthesise plausible-but-wrong completions as hard negatives." This limitation is acknowledged implicitly by contrasting with "per-language execution sandboxes that do not apply at mid-keystroke." To incorporate execution feedback, the pipeline could be extended by adding a sandboxed execution step (e.g., via Docker) that verifies whether a completion causes a runtime error, using that signal as an additional filter or reward in a reinforcement learning loop. However, the paper does not propose or evaluate such an extension; it remains a speculative future direction.
answer.zh: 论文的无需执行方法无法检测需要运行时执行的幻觉，例如运行时的NameError或ImportError，因为它从不运行代码。它仅依赖来自前沿模型的静态合理性，如所述：“我们提出一种无需执行的替代方案：使用前沿代码模型合成看似合理但错误的补全作为硬负样本。”这一局限性通过对比“在击键中途不适用的每种语言执行沙箱”而隐含地得到承认。为了纳入执行反馈，可以通过添加沙箱执行步骤（例如通过Docker）来扩展流程，该步骤验证补全是否导致运行时错误，并将该信号用作强化学习循环中的额外过滤器或奖励。然而，论文并未提出或评估此类扩展；这仍然是一个推测性的未来方向。

question.en: The Delulu benchmark evaluates FIM hallucinations across eight languages using Docker verification. How does this benchmark improve upon existing evaluations like HumanEval-Infilling or SAFIM, and what gaps remain for measuring repository-level integration and long-context correctness?
question.zh: Delulu基准测试使用Docker验证跨八种语言的FIM幻觉。该基准测试如何改进现有评估（如HumanEval-Infilling或SAFIM）？在衡量仓库级集成和长上下文正确性方面还存在哪些差距？

reason.en: Addresses the user's interest in new benchmarks that go beyond pass@k and measure real-world outcomes, especially for repo-level tasks.
reason.zh: 回应用户对超越pass@k并衡量现实结果（尤其是仓库级任务）的新基准的兴趣。

answer.en: The Delulu benchmark improves upon existing evaluations like HumanEval-Infilling and SAFIM by being a "Docker-verified multilingual FIM hallucination benchmark" that explicitly targets hallucination types across eight languages, whereas prior benchmarks focus on general FIM correctness without hallucination-specific verification. The paper shows that fine-tuning on Delulu-derived data lifts performance on "every HumanEval-Infilling split and every SAFIM subset" alongside Delulu itself, suggesting Delulu captures complementary signal. However, the paper does not address gaps for measuring repository-level integration or long-context correctness; its pipeline scrapes "multilingual FIM contexts from public GitHub" at the snippet level, and the evaluation remains within single-file FIM contexts. No discussion of cross-file dependencies or long-range correctness is provided, so these gaps persist.
answer.zh: Delulu基准测试通过成为一个“Docker验证的多语言FIM幻觉基准测试”，明确针对八种语言的幻觉类型，改进了现有评估（如HumanEval-Infilling和SAFIM），而先前的基准测试侧重于通用FIM正确性，没有针对幻觉的验证。论文显示，在Delulu衍生数据上微调提升了“每个HumanEval-Infilling分割和每个SAFIM子集”以及Delulu本身的性能，表明Delulu捕获了互补信号。然而，论文没有解决衡量仓库级集成或长上下文正确性的差距；其流程在片段级别抓取“来自公共GitHub的多语言FIM上下文”，评估仍限于单文件FIM上下文。没有提供关于跨文件依赖或长范围正确性的讨论，因此这些差距仍然存在。

question.en: The paper curates a 100K-row dataset with a difficulty-aware fool rate. How does this selection mechanism influence the quality of synthetic negatives, and what insights do the ablation studies provide about the optimal difficulty level for fine-tuning small code models?
question.zh: 论文策划了一个10万行数据集，具有难度感知的愚弄率。这种选择机制如何影响合成负样本的质量？消融研究提供了哪些关于微调小型代码模型的最佳难度水平的见解？

reason.en: Probes a key design choice in the post-training pipeline, relating to data quality and model improvement, which aligns with the user's interest in post-training techniques.
reason.zh: 探究后训练流程中的一个关键设计选择，涉及数据质量和模型改进，与用户对后训练技术的兴趣一致。

answer.en: The paper curates a 100K-row dataset by selecting synthetic negatives based on a "difficulty-aware fool rate," which measures how often a frontier model's generated completion fools a judge. This mechanism directly influences quality by ensuring that only plausibly misleading hallucinations—those that a judge cannot easily distinguish from ground truth—are retained as hard negatives. The curation step is described as using "fool-rate LLM judging" and is listed as one of the five key ablation axes. While the abstract mentions "five-axis ablations (size, type mix, language coverage, base-model family, and a difficulty-aware fool rate)," the paper does not provide explicit ablation results in the provided text that isolate the optimal difficulty level or quantify its effect on fine-tuning small code models. The closest evidence is that fine-tuning on the curated 100K subset "lifts Delulu exact match by +18.8 points and edit similarity by +0.22," but this is the aggregate result of the curated dataset, not an ablation specifically varying the fool rate threshold. Therefore, the paper does not clearly address what the optimal difficulty level is based on the ablations presented in the excerpt.
answer.zh: 论文通过基于“难度感知的愚弄率”选择合成负样本来策划一个10万行数据集，该愚弄率衡量前沿模型生成的补全愚弄评判者的频率。这种机制通过确保只有看似合理的误导性幻觉——那些评判者无法轻易与真实答案区分的幻觉——被保留为硬负样本，直接影响质量。策划步骤被描述为使用“愚弄率LLM评判”，并被列为五个关键消融轴之一。虽然摘要提到“五轴消融（大小、类型混合、语言覆盖、基础模型家族和难度感知的愚弄率）”，但论文在提供的文本中没有提供明确隔离最佳难度水平或量化其对微调小型代码模型影响的消融结果。最接近的证据是，在策划的10万子集上微调“将Delulu精确匹配提升了+18.8个点，编辑相似度提升了+0.22”，但这是策划数据集的总体结果，并非专门改变愚弄率阈值的消融。因此，基于摘录中呈现的消融，论文并未明确说明最佳难度水平是什么。
